title: Evaluate V8 Code Caching Strategies
description: Explain the purpose and mechanisms of V8 code caching. Evaluate different V8 code caching strategies for optimizing cold-start performance in serverless environments. Apply code caching techniques to improve the performance of long-lived Node.js processes.
objectives: Explain the purpose and mechanisms of V8 code caching.
Evaluate different V8 code caching strategies for optimizing cold-start performance in serverless environments.
Apply code caching techniques to improve the performance of long-lived Node.js processes.
